image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if I told you nerves communicate through a traveling spike of electricity?
Context visual: This electric spike, known as the action potential, is essential for sending signals in your body.
Escalation visual: Imagine billions of these spikes racing down neurons, orchestrating everything from a twitch to a thought.
Evidence visual: When a neuron fires, it opens ion channels, allowing sodium to rush in, creating that spike. Then, potassium flows out t
Payoff visual: This rapid ion exchange travels down the neuron at lightning speed, relaying vital information throughout your body — al
Cta visual: Curious about more brain mysteries? Hit that follow for more science secrets!
